title: festuca ovina var. arizonica
intro: Festuca ovina var. arizonica, also known as Arizona blue grass, is a type of grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Festuca ovina var. arizonica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
